plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs to eliminate risk.
Reduce exposure in QQQI and CRWD to lower concentration.
Trim SPY to meet single-name limit and reduce broad index share.
Buy AMAT and ANET as quality additions with good risk/reward.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with a significant cash buffer.
Expect lower volatility and modest returns in this conservative mode.
conservative.read: This plan aims for capital preservation with a target of around 1.5% per month. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration risk, holding a larger cash buffer for safety. Expect lower potential upside but also a more stable ride with reduced drawdown potential.

plan: Trim SOXL and sell SPAL to manage leveraged ETF exposure.
Reduce QQQI and SPY to decrease concentration and income focus.
Increase CRWD to double down on a strong performer.
Add SPXL for leveraged broad index exposure and DDOG for tech growth.
This balanced approach seeks growth while managing risk.
Expect moderate returns and moderate drawdowns.
balanced.read: This plan targets around 2.5% per month by blending broad index exposure with quality tech and controlled leverage. It reduces concentration and trims high-risk leveraged ETFs while adding new growth opportunities. Expect balanced growth with moderate risk.

plan: Increase SOXL and add SPAL to maximize leveraged ETF exposure.
Sell QQQI to remove income focus and trim SPY for concentration.
Aggressively add to CRWD and add SPXL and ANET for growth.
This plan concentrates heavily on tech and leveraged ETFs.
Expect high potential returns but also significantly higher drawdowns.
Strict stop discipline is crucial due to amplified risk and leverage decay.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets around 4% per month by concentrating on high-conviction tech names and increasing leveraged ETF exposure. It accepts higher risk, larger drawdowns, and the daily decay of leveraged ETFs for maximum growth potential. Strict stop discipline is paramount.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs and high-beta single names.
Eliminate exposure to volatile sectors like semiconductors.
Increase QQQI significantly for income generation.
Add to SPY for broad market exposure and stability.
Buy CRM as a quality name with potential for stable returns.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly income and capital preservation.
income.read: This income-focused plan targets around 1% per month by prioritizing income-generating assets and broad market exposure. It cuts all high-beta and leveraged positions to minimize volatility and maximize reliable distributions. Expect low drawdowns and consistent, though variable, income.
